qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing record-level authorization allows IDOR attacks on module operations
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns missing record-level authorization on id_record module operations; it does not identify the Scadenzario id_records[] SQL IN-clause injection in modules/scadenzario/bulk.php.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Zip Slip path traversal in module upload and backup restore allows arbitrary file overwrite
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns unsafe ZIP extraction in src/Util/Zip.php and module upload/backup restore paths; it does not identify the Scadenzario id_records[] SQL IN-clause injection in modules/scadenzario/bulk.php.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying final finding identifies the advisory-described root cause: authenticated SQL injection through id_records[] in /actions.php?id_module=18, where non-integer array elements pass through array_clean() and are concatenated by implode() into the IN clause in modules/scadenzario/bulk.php.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-4xwv-49c8-fvhq describes error-based SQL injection in the Scadenzario bulk operations module via id_records[] and modules/scadenzario/bulk.php.
vuln_idor_missing_auth reports missing record-level authorization for id_record operations across module actions.
vuln_zipslip_path_traversal reports unsafe ZIP archive extraction and arbitrary file overwrite through Zip::extract().

Search of final vulnerability reports and PoC reports found no qualifying finding for Scadenzario, id_records[], modules/scadenzario/bulk.php, EXTRACTVALUE, or the advisory SQL injection source-to-sink path.
